{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Seishen Lords
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The family has been searching for the [[Seishen Lords]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
